Video.summary: A gunsmith and a crack shot duel.
Video.title: The Gunsmith

Video.summary: Civil War loyalties are split when Southern sympathizers want to send gold to the Confederacy.
Video.title: Eruption at Volcano

Video.summary: A white man who lives among Native tribes tries to foil a plot to steal gold claims from their land.
Video.title: The Blond King

Video.summary: Two brothers agree to share any fortune. One digs for gold while the other raises the family horse.
Video.title: Half a Loaf

Video.summary: Sam Kee, ostracized because he's Chinese, finds refuge at a fort after saving a soldier's life.
Video.title: Sam Kee and Uncle Sam

Video.summary: A notorious Apache is in the area and a local captain's son is missing.
Video.title: The Little Trooper

Video.summary: Actor Edwin Booth faces discrimination due to his brother's assassination of President Lincoln.
Video.title: His Brother's Keeper

Video.summary: A reformed criminal's former partners in crime come calling after robbing a bank.
Video.title: The Devil's Due

Video.summary: Steve Hewitt accidentally kills the dogs of miner Tully and is haunted by his mistake.
Video.title: Dogs of the Mist

Video.summary: A marshal takes on a mission to retrieve a stolen wedding dress while an outlaw gang runs wild.
Video.title: A Wedding Dress

Video.summary: Lt. Bradshaw is tasked with enforcing a tax on immigrant miners despite his conflicted sympathies.
Video.title: The Battle of Mokelumne Hill

Video.summary: A hate-filled drifter threatens successful rancher John Gaunt and his family.
Video.title: The Strangers

Video.summary: A couple face opposition to their marriage, the governor of California.
Video.title: Forbidden Wedding

Video.summary: A failed and widowed prospector buys a goat farm to support his family - and stumbles upon gold.
Video.title: One Man Tank

Video.summary: A general becomes widely unpopular when he plans to resettle Natives onto a reservation.
Video.title: The Man Everyone Hated

Video.summary: America's first female judge loses her life savings and her husband in a fight against corruption.
Video.title: A Woman's Rights

Video.summary: A Native chief's young widow fights an ancient ritual following her husband's death.
Video.title: Human Sacrifice

Video.summary: On a peace mission, a rancher and a Native meet a prospector who thinks they're after his gold.
Video.title: Mission to the Mountains

Video.summary: A former prospector is hired by a young woman to find her fiancé, who became lost in the mountains.
Video.title: Somewhere in the Vultures

Video.summary: A widow's ranch is requisitioned by the Union Army, making her the target of Confederate cavalrymen.
Video.title: Splinter Station

Video.summary: A detective falls in love while investigating the smuggling of high-grade ore out of a mine.
Video.title: Queen of the High Graders

Video.summary: A teacher steps in when an outlaw influences a youngster.
Video.title: Learnin' at Dirty Devil

Video.summary: Fighting corrupt lawmen and vigilantes.
Yvonne DeCarlo plays a doctor struggling to begin a medical practice as a woman in the 1890s.
Video.title: The Lady Was an M.D.

Video.summary: Matt Denby faces severe bad luck: his son is bitten by a rabid animal and his wife leaves him.
Video.title: The Madstone

Video.summary: A con artist boasts he owns most of San Francisco, but a chemist aims to expose him.
Video.title: The Stolen City

Video.summary: A female patriot meets an outlaw.
Video.title: General Without a Cause

Video.summary: A woman prospector, her long-lost husband and a timid man create a love triangle.
Video.title: Big Liz

Video.summary: Buff McCloud runs a Nevada town with an iron fist - until a stranger arrives.
Video.title: Forty Steps to Glory

Video.summary: A doctor, ostracized after allowing a patient to die, gets a chance at redemption.
Video.title: The Scalpel and the Gun

Video.summary: A vagabond finds stolen riches and becomes a philanthropist.
Video.title: Money to Burn

Video.summary: Saloonkeeper Shanghai Kelly kidnaps crewmen for understaffed ships.
Video.title: Shanghai Kelly's Birthday Party

Video.summary: A tomboy changes her ways when she meets the handsome constable of a mining town.
Video.title: The Indiana Girl

Video.summary: An inexperienced young man hears about a planned ambush on the sheriff and vows to help.
Video.title: The Friend

Video.summary: Life on the prairie is anything but easy for a newly married Swedish immigrant.
Video.title: Britta Goes Home

Video.summary: Two Americans on their way to Santa Fe are captured by Mexican troops and held prisoner.
Video.title: Bread on the Desert

Video.summary: A miner invests his life savings on a tip from a dying criminal.
Video.title: The Secret of the Black Prince

Image.alt: The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince

Video.summary: John Slaughter's deputy poses a problem: the maverick is prone to violence and accepting bribes.
Video.title: A Shortcut Through Tombstone

Video.summary: Citizens gather to watch a man make good on his claim that his horse can swim the Catalina Channel.
Video.title: The World's Greatest Swimming Horse

Video.summary: A former outlaw takes the unenviable job of sheriff in a lawless town, and old habits die hard.
Video.title: A Restless Man

Video.summary: Renegade Natives led by a white man named Clay threaten the residents of a decommissioned fort.
Video.title: Long Night at Fort Lonely

Video.summary: Best friends recently out of the U.S. Army use a card game to determine a decision about marriage.
Video.title: A Full House

Video.summary: Wagon master Caleb must bring his wayward son Johnny to justice after the boy goes too far.
Video.title: A Simple Question of Justice

Video.summary: A cook skims gold nuggets off miners while working at their camp and faces the penalty of hanging.
Video.title: Early Candle Lighten

Video.summary: Count Peter intends to wed a don's daughter, but a misunderstanding lands him in hot water.
Video.title: Count Me In, Count Me Out

Image.alt: Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out

Video.summary: Tiger Lil tries to leave her dance hall days behind her, but Frank Johnson won't give up on her.
Video.title: Lady with a Past
